attributes.title: HEGO - Monitoring
attributes.description: Service health, ingestion timestamps, index volumes, and monitoring alerts for the HEGO platform.

attributes.title: Service Health
attributes.description: Health status of all HEGO services from Prometheus

attributes.title: Last Ingestion by Source
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last successful ingestion for each data source

attributes.title: Index Volumes
attributes.description: Document count and storage size for each Elasticsearch index

attributes.title: Ingestion Rate
attributes.description: Documents ingested per hour over the last 7 days
